$schema_comment: Machine-readable state and lifecycle model for the browser reference client.

disconnected.description: No active websocket; send button disabled

connected.description: Handshake complete; encrypted application traffic allowed

transitions.trigger: app.handleConnect()
successful handshake
connect failure
effects: do not schedule reconnect unless a prior connected session existed

transitions.trigger: reconnect attempt failure
websocket close while `_closed == false` and prior `state == connected`
conditions: close was not initiated via app.disconnect()
connection had already reached connected state

transitions.trigger: app.disconnect()
auto reconnect retry

unknown.description: identity metadata has not been checked yet

absent.description: no persisted browser identity is currently known

persisted_metadata.description: an identity record exists in IndexedDB, but the private key has not been imported into runtime memory yet

loaded.description: the browser identity keypair is loaded into runtime memory and ready for transport use

memory_only.description: an identity exists only for the current page session because persistence is unavailable or intentionally skipped

unsupported.description: persistent identity storage is unavailable in this browser

transitions.trigger: app.init() finds a stored identity record
app.init() finds no stored identity
browser does not provide usable indexeddb persistence
connect imports the stored identity successfully
connect creates a new identity and persistence succeeds
connect creates a new identity but persistence is unavailable or write fails
effects: continue using the identity for the current page session only

transitions.trigger: stored identity import fails or identity store cannot be trusted for this session
effects: avoid overwriting the stored identity during the same session

transitions.trigger: identity reset deletes the stored identity
identity reset clears the temporary identity
identity file import succeeds and persistence is available
effects: replace any existing stored identity record
show imported fingerprint in connect panel
defer private-key import until next connect

transitions.trigger: identity file import succeeds but persistence is unavailable
effects: load imported keypair into runtime memory
warn user that the import is page-scoped only

agent_selection_model.restore_rule: reuse the saved agent if it still exists in the latest agents.list response; otherwise fall back to the first available agent

non_streaming: resolve on response.result or reject on response.error
streaming: observe stream_end without resolving; final response still required
interruptions: relay error rejects all pending requests
timeout rejects the affected pending request

recovery_hints.memory_only: warn that reload will rotate identity unless exported
recovery_hints.unsupported: explain IndexedDB is unavailable and import/export becomes temporary
recovery_hints.load_failed: tell the operator to import a backup or reset before reconnecting

transitions.trigger: successful connect
user disconnect or identity reset
user starts a new chat locally
effects: keep transport connection and selected agent
